backgroundElements.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-cyan-500/10 to-cyan-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
backgroundElements.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-cyan-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob

header.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-gray-800/50 text-cyan-400 backdrop-blur-sm border border-gray-700
header.headline: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold text-white mb-6 leading-tight
header.primaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 text-base font-medium text-white bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-700 rounded-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-cyan-500/25 hover:-translate-y-0.5
header.secondaryButton: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 text-base font-medium text-gray-300 border-2 border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5

featureCards.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mt-16

card.container: group bg-gray-800/50 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-800/80 transition-all duration-300

header.iconContainer: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gray-700/50 flex items-center justify-center
header.title: text-xl font-bold text-white group-hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors
